title: Peppery Mediterranean Omelette
description: A fluffy omelette filled with the flavors of the Mediterranean, perfect for breakfast or brunch. This recipe is a great way to get a dose of protein and vegetables to start your day.
instructions: Crack the eggwhite into a bowl and whisk it until it's frothy.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the peppery and mediterranean.
Pour the eggwhite over the vegetables and cook until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Continue cooking and folding until the omelette is almost set.
Use the spatula to carefully fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another minute and then slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate.
